_fixtureMetadata.query: SELECT session_id, user_id, channel, issued_at, expires_at, revoked_at FROM user_identity.sessions LIMIT 1
_fixtureMetadata.description: Fixture data for AUTH-004 sessions-flow integration tests. Covers JWT issuance, /auth/sessions/me, refresh, and revoke E2E sequence. Phone numbers are E.164 formatted unique per scenario (series 900300-900399). UUIDs are v4 format.

jwt_issue_and_me.description: AC-D1.1 + AC-D2.1: Full OTP verify → JWT issued → /me returns 200

me_revoked_session.description: AC-D2.5: Active session revoked in DB → /me returns 401 despite valid JWT sig

refresh_flow.description: AC-D3.1 + AC-D3.2: Full OTP verify → /refresh → new JWT with same sid → /me still 200 → revoke → refresh 401

revoke_flow.description: AC-D4.1 + AC-D4.2: Full OTP verify → /revoke → 204 → /me 401 → second /revoke → 204 again

jwt_config.description: Deterministic 32-byte hex secret for tests. NOT a production secret.
